name: Oven-Roasted Pork 'n Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 2 to 3 lb Carrots, peeled, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450°F.
2. Generously spray a baking pan with non-stick cooking spray.
3. Place the pork tenderloin in the center of the pan.
4. Insert a meat thermometer into the thickest part of the pork.
5. Arrange the carrots, potatoes, and onion around the pork.
6. Drizzle olive oil evenly over all the ingredients.
7. Sprinkle crushed rosemary, sage, and pepper on top.
8. Bake uncovered for 30-40 minutes, or until the meat thermometer reads 165°F and vegetables are tender.
9. Stir the vegetables occasionally during baking.
